name: accessible-icon
visual_summary: An icon component that meets accessibility standards, use when you need to display an icon in your app that meets accessibility requirements.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: accessible-icon
Description: An icon component that meets accessibility standards, use when you need to display an icon in your app that meets accessibility requirements.
Style: 
Interactions: 
Tags: icon, accessibility

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/radix-ui-themes/src/components/accessible-icon.tsx
import { AccessibleIcon as AccessibleIconPrimitive } from 'radix-ui';
export const AccessibleIcon = AccessibleIconPrimitive.Root;
export type AccessibleIconProps = AccessibleIconPrimitive.AccessibleIconProps;
